prose.en: Produce, control, and distribute asymmetric cryptographic keys using {param:sc-12.03_odp}.

choices.value: NSA-approved key management technology and processes
DoD-approved or DoD-issued Medium Assurance PKI certificates
DoD-approved or DoD-issued Medium Hardware Assurance PKI certificates and hardware security tokens that protect the user’s private key
certificates issued in accordance with organization-defined requirements

guidance.en: SP 800-56A, SP 800-56B , and SP 800-56C provide guidance on cryptographic key establishment schemes and key derivation methods. SP 800-57-1, SP 800-57-2 , and SP 800-57-3 provide guidance on cryptographic key management.

prose.en: asymmetric cryptographic keys are produced using {param:sc-12.03_odp};
asymmetric cryptographic keys are controlled using {param:sc-12.03_odp};
asymmetric cryptographic keys are distributed using {param:sc-12.03_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing cryptographic key establishment and management
system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of approved PKI Class 3 and Class 4 certificates
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with responsibilities for cryptographic key establishment or management
organizational personnel with responsibilities for PKI certificates
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing asymmetric cryptographic key establishment and management
